name: cv2-map
description: Pixel-perfect Castlevania II map extraction tools.

scripts.mesen:smoke: node src/index.js mesen-capture --rom roms/cv2.nes --script tools/mesen/smoke-capture.lua --out out/mesen-smoke --timeout 10
scripts.mesen:memtypes: node src/index.js mesen-capture --rom roms/cv2.nes --script tools/mesen/discover-memtypes.lua --out out/mesen-memtypes --timeout 10
scripts.capture:jova: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name jova-day --location Jova --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/jova-day --timeout 60 --start-presses 240:20,2000:20,3500:20 --capture-frame 5000
scripts.capture:jova-right: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name jova-right-day --location "Jova right screen" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/jova-right-day --timeout 60 --inputs start:240:20,start:2000:20,start:3500:20,right:3900:1200 --capture-frame 5200
scripts.capture:jova-woods: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name jova-woods-day --location "Jova Woods" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/jova-woods-day --timeout 30 --state out/states/jova-woods.mss --settle-frames 30
scripts.capture:dora-woods-part-2: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name dora-woods-part-2-day --location "Dora Woods - Part 2" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/dora-woods-part-2-day --timeout 30 --state out/states/dora-woods-part-2.mss --settle-frames 30
scripts.capture:dabis-path: node src/index.js mesen-capture-screen --rom roms/cv2.nes --name dabis-path-day --location "Dabi's Path" --variant day --access outdoor --out out/captures/dabis-path-day --timeout 30 --state out/states/dabis-path.mss --settle-frames 30
scripts.audit:render-recipes: node src/index.js audit-render-recipes --rom roms/cv2.nes --fixtures data/render-recipe-fixtures.json --out out/render-recipe-audit
scripts.render:recipe-atlas: node src/index.js render-recipe-atlas --rom roms/cv2.nes --audit out/render-recipe-audit/audit.json --out out/render-recipe-atlas
scripts.analyze:interior:berkeley: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id berkeley-mansion --objset 0x01 --area 0x07 --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/berkeley-mansion.json
scripts.analyze:interior:jova: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id jova-interiors --objset 0x00 --areas 0x07,0x08,0x09 --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/jova-interiors.json
scripts.analyze:interior:veros: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id veros-interiors --objset 0x00 --areas 0x07,0x0A,0x0B --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/veros-interiors.json
scripts.analyze:interior:aljiba: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id aljiba-interiors --objset 0x00 --areas 0x0C,0x0D,0x0E --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/aljiba-interiors.json
scripts.analyze:interior:alba: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id alba-interiors --objset 0x00 --areas 0x07,0x0F,0x10 --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/alba-interiors.json
scripts.analyze:interior:ondol: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id ondol-interiors --objset 0x00 --areas 0x11,0x12,0x13 --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/ondol-interiors.json
scripts.analyze:interior:lauber: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id lauber-mansion --objset 0x01 --area 0x08 --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/lauber-mansion.json
scripts.analyze:interior:brahm: node src/index.js analyze-interior-map --rom roms/cv2.nes --id brahm-mansion --objset 0x01 --area 0x09 --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/interior-map-research/brahm-mansion.json
scripts.decode:title-transfer: node src/index.js decode-transfer --rom roms/cv2.nes --bank 4 --address 0x8000 --mirroring vertical --out out/decoder/title-transfer.bin
scripts.render:jova-native: node src/index.js render-background-native --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-day --compare out/captures/jova-day/ppu-2000-2fff-nametables.bin --visible-page 0 --out out/decoder/jova-native-nametables.bin
scripts.render:jova-native-png: node src/index.js render-background-native-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-day --state out/captures/jova-day/state.json --compare-png out/captures/jova-day/background.png --out out/decoder/jova-native-background.png
scripts.render:jova-right-native-png: node src/index.js render-background-native-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-day --state out/captures/jova-right-day/state.json --visible-page 1 --compare-png out/captures/jova-right-day/background.png --out out/decoder/jova-right-native-background.png
scripts.render:jova-woods-native-png: node src/index.js render-background-native-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --descriptor jova-woods-day --state out/captures/jova-woods-day/state.json --compare-png out/captures/jova-woods-day/background.png --out out/decoder/jova-woods-native-background.png
scripts.render:region:jova-to-veros: node src/index.js render-region-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --region jova-to-veros-day --out out/regions/jova-to-veros-day.png --metadata-out out/regions/jova-to-veros-day.json
scripts.render:segment:jova-woods: node src/index.js render-layout-segment-png --rom roms/cv2.nes --segment jova-woods-day --out out/layout-segments/jova-woods-day.png --metadata-out out/layout-segments/jova-woods-day.json
scripts.render:composition:exterior: node src/index.js render-exterior-composition --rom roms/cv2.nes --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out out/exterior-composition
scripts.render:world:exterior: node src/index.js render-exterior-world-composition --rom roms/cv2.nes --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --transition-rules out/transition-routine/decoder.json --out out/exterior-world-composition
scripts.guide:slice:jova-to-berkeley: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/jova-to-berkeley.json --layout branch-continuous --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/slices/jova-to-berkeley
scripts.guide:scene:berkeley-mansion: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/berkeley-mansion.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/berkeley-mansion
scripts.guide:scene:jova-church: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/jova-church.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/jova-church
scripts.guide:scene:jova-thorn-whip-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/jova-thorn-whip-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/jova-thorn-whip-room
scripts.guide:scene:jova-holy-water-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/jova-holy-water-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/jova-holy-water-room
scripts.guide:scenes:jova: npm run guide:scene:jova-church && npm run guide:scene:jova-thorn-whip-room && npm run guide:scene:jova-holy-water-room
scripts.guide:scene:veros-dagger-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/veros-dagger-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/veros-dagger-room
scripts.guide:scene:veros-church: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/veros-church.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/veros-church
scripts.guide:scene:veros-chain-whip-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/veros-chain-whip-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/veros-chain-whip-room
scripts.guide:scenes:veros: npm run guide:scene:veros-dagger-room && npm run guide:scene:veros-church && npm run guide:scene:veros-chain-whip-room
scripts.guide:scene:aljiba-garlic-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/aljiba-garlic-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/aljiba-garlic-room
scripts.guide:scene:aljiba-laurels-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/aljiba-laurels-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/aljiba-laurels-room
scripts.guide:scene:alba-garlic-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/alba-garlic-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/alba-garlic-room
scripts.guide:scene:alba-church: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/alba-church.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/alba-church
scripts.guide:scene:alba-laurels-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/alba-laurels-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/alba-laurels-room
scripts.guide:scene:ondol-morning-star-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/ondol-morning-star-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/ondol-morning-star-room
scripts.guide:scene:ondol-laurels-room: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/ondol-laurels-room.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/ondol-laurels-room
scripts.guide:scene:lauber-mansion: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/lauber-mansion.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/lauber-mansion
scripts.guide:scene:brahm-mansion: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/brahm-mansion.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/brahm-mansion
scripts.guide:scene:castlevania: node src/index.js build-guide-slice --rom roms/cv2.nes --slice guide/source/castlevania.json --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out guide/assets/scenes/castlevania
scripts.guide:scenes:aljiba: npm run guide:scene:aljiba-garlic-room && npm run guide:scene:aljiba-book-old-lady-room && npm run guide:scene:aljiba-laurels-room
scripts.guide:scenes:alba: npm run guide:scene:alba-garlic-room && npm run guide:scene:alba-church && npm run guide:scene:alba-laurels-room
scripts.guide:scenes:ondol: npm run guide:scene:ondol-morning-star-room && npm run guide:scene:ondol-death-star-lady-room && npm run guide:scene:ondol-laurels-room
scripts.guide:web:dev: npm run guide:wasm:build && npm --prefix web/guide-map run dev
scripts.guide:web:build: npm run guide:wasm:build && npm --prefix web/guide-map run build
scripts.trace:actors: node src/index.js run-actor-traces --rom roms/cv2.nes --fixtures data/actor-trace-fixtures.json --out out/actor-traces
scripts.decode:actor-selector-streams: node src/index.js decode-actor-selector-streams --rom roms/cv2.nes --fixtures data/actor-trace-fixtures.json --traces out/actor-traces --out out/actor-selector-streams
scripts.build:enemy-atlas: node src/index.js build-enemy-atlas --rom roms/cv2.nes --atlas out/render-recipe-atlas/manifest.json --out data/enemy-atlas.json
scripts.probe:transitions: node src/index.js run-transition-probes --rom roms/cv2.nes --fixtures data/transition-probes.json --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --out out/transition-probes
scripts.decode:transition-routine: node src/index.js decode-transition-routine --rom roms/cv2.nes --probes out/transition-probes/analysis.json --topology out/exterior-topology/topology.json --out out/transition-routine
